result_quality.summary: Host-side tests, build, playability, and transcript roundtrip established that the resulting application met the benchmark outcome.

runtime_health.summary: The run completed through the real provider-backed loop, but the exported diagnostics still showed some tool and command failures worth monitoring.

convergence.summary: Provider round count and tool churn were acceptable for a real coding-agent capstone, but not yet especially lean.

cost_efficiency.summary: Token and tool usage were proportional to the difficulty of a real 2048 build, though the run still carried noticeable iteration cost.
